evals.prompt: 把 Build Advisor 和 Agent Work Reviewer Maintainer 连起来用，先从用户场景和需求出发设计一个 Octopus UI 工作流方案，然后 spawn 两个 reviewer agent 审，没通过就返工，至少两轮后给我最终方案。
evals.expected_output: Runs an advisor-first workflow, creates a scenario and requirement map before solution details, sends the artifact to two distinct reviewer roles, revises based on blockers, and reports two review rounds before final handoff.
expectations: The result uses Build Advisor-style scenario and requirement analysis before judging or implementing.
The result defines two independent reviewer roles rather than a single self-review, and states whether actual reviewers were spawned or a serial fallback was used.
The result includes at least two review rounds or clearly explains why a blocker prevents completing the loop.
The result states coverage boundaries and avoids claiming literal 100% certainty.

evals.prompt: 这个 agent skill draft：.agents/skills/maintainer/agent-work-reviewer-maintainer/SKILL.md 我不确定够不够稳。用 advisor-review-loop-maintainer 帮我做第一性原理 review：场景、触发条件、eval、subagent review 协议、corner cases 都要看，两轮不过就继续改。
evals.expected_output: Reviews the named skill draft as a reusable workflow artifact, checking trigger description, workflow contract, evalability, reviewer protocol, edge cases, and whether findings from the first round are resolved in a second round.
expectations: The result treats the skill as a reusable operating procedure, not just prose.
The result checks trigger description, eval prompts or evalability, and the subagent review protocol.
The result blocks final acceptance when first-round reviewer findings remain unresolved.
The result does not review an absent artifact; it uses the named file or asks for the missing draft if it cannot be read.

evals.prompt: 我只想写 proposal，不要实现。先用 build-advisor 出方案，再用两个 reviewer 从产品场景和工程可执行性上审两轮。最后直接输出 proposal 和 review 结果。
evals.expected_output: Keeps the task proposal-only, does not implement, uses two reviewer perspectives for two iterations, and returns a decision-ready proposal plus evidence of review and remaining risks.
expectations: The result respects proposal-only scope and does not start implementation.
The result separates product scenario review from engineering execution review.
The result finalizes with a proposal, review verdicts, and residual decisions rather than a code-change handoff.

evals.prompt: Round 1 reviewer 说 proposal 还没覆盖权限和失败恢复，但作者只改了文案，没有补场景。继续用 advisor-review-loop-maintainer 跑第二轮，不通过就别交付。
evals.expected_output: Treats unresolved round-one blockers as still blocking, checks whether the second-round artifact actually resolves permissions and failure recovery, and refuses final acceptance if the changes are only cosmetic.
expectations: The result verifies that round-one blockers were actually resolved before accepting.
The result distinguishes cosmetic edits from scenario or requirement fixes.
The result continues targeted rework or reports a blocker instead of stopping merely because two rounds happened.

evals.prompt: review-only：帮我审一下这个 proposal 的场景覆盖和 reviewer 协议，但先不要改文件，也不要返工实现。只要 verdict、blocking gaps、smallest changes needed。
evals.expected_output: Runs the advisor and reviewer framing in review-only mode, gives verdicts and smallest changes needed, and explicitly avoids editing files, rewriting the artifact, or continuing into implementation/rework without user approval.
expectations: The result recognizes review-only mode and does not edit or rewrite the target artifact.
The result stops at verdicts, blocking gaps, and smallest changes needed.
The result requires explicit user approval before switching from review to rework or implementation.

evals.prompt: 左上角这个 button 点击有问题，直接去掉这个 button 好了 [$advisor-review-loop-maintainer](/Users/zeeland/projects/octopus/.agents/skills/maintainer/advisor-review-loop-maintainer/SKILL.md)
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the explicit skill invocation but uses the lightweight route because this is a narrow UI fix without reviewer agents, repeated rounds, or an acceptance gate.
expectations: The result does not run or claim a full two-reviewer loop for a small button removal.
The result performs a short advisor scope check and then follows UI-polish implementation discipline.
The result explicitly says the lightweight route was used and why.
The result still requires focused tests and rendered proof or a named blocker.

evals.prompt: <turn_aborted>previous turn interrupted</turn_aborted> /goal 一口气都做完 [$advisor-review-loop-maintainer](/Users/zeeland/projects/octopus/.agents/skills/maintainer/advisor-review-loop-maintainer/SKILL.md)
evals.expected_output: Rebuilds state before continuing a long-running loop, including branch/dirty state, partial commits, merge or conflict state, running validation, remaining task list, and missing proof.
expectations: The result does not assume the interrupted previous turn finished cleanly.
The result inspects current state before editing or claiming progress.
The result produces a resumable checklist and validation boundary before continuing implementation.
